calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 25, 2022 is admitted to probate. Michael Kamler is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
